title: Wave-1: hybrid data-testid sweep across product UI + selectors.ts constants

files_to_modify: src/app/[locale]/**/*.tsx (login, signup, verify, verify-email-sent, dashboard, scan/[id], report/[id], active-test, pricing, checkout/success forms/CTAs/dynamic regions/tab panels)

acceptance_criteria: ONE task / one owner (race-safety — no parallel annotation). Add data-testid ONLY to: form controls + their submit buttons, dynamic/locale-translated/animated regions, tab panels and disclosure widgets with ambiguous/repeated role-or-text. Everything else stays role/text-selectable (D1 hybrid — do NOT blanket-annotate).
Every new data-testid value is declared as a named constant in e2e/support/selectors.ts; NO inline testid string literals anywhere. selectors.ts remains the single home (AR-L2).

SECURITY CRITICAL: testids are STATIC string literals only — never bound to user/session/scan/scanId/email or any runtime data. No conditional-render logic altered; pure attribute additions; no behavioural change.
No change to component logic, props contracts, styling, or i18n strings. `git diff` is attribute-only.
npm run typecheck + npm run lint + npm run test + npm run build all pass (no regression in the existing unit/integration suite).
List, in the explanation, exactly which security-surface files (checkout, login, signup, active-test) were touched so Phase-4 can diff them specifically.
output_format: code plus a plain-English list of every annotated file, the testid constants added, and explicit confirmation no testid is data-bound
